title: Peaks Library Breaking Changes
description: Manually-curated table of known breaking changes per (library, fromMajor, toMajor). Used by peaks-rd/qa to warn the LLM about deprecated APIs when writing code for projects on a newer major than the LLM's training data. Read by the LLM via the Read tool; the data file at library-breaking-changes.data.json holds the actual rows. Doctor validates parse-ability of this schema file.

fromMajor.description: The major version the breaking change applies FROM. LLM cross-references (project major === toMajor) to fire the warning.

toMajor.description: The major version the breaking change applies TO (i.e. the new major where the API changed).

api.description: The deprecated/removed API call, e.g. 'Drawer.width'. Should be a substring that the LLM can grep for in the diff's import + JSX blocks.

replacement.description: The v2 API to use instead, e.g. 'Drawer.size'. If empty, the API is removed entirely (no v2 equivalent).

since.description: The semver string where this breaking change took effect, e.g. '5.0.0'. Matches the toMajor.
